message:
feat(engine): HMAC-SHA256 keyed hash, stdlib Array/String.at and copyWithin, benchmark and lowering improvements

Replace the hand-rolled SipHash-inspired keyed hash in hash_tiers.rs
with proper HMAC-SHA256 from the hmac crate, removing ~100 lines of
custom mixing rounds. The keyed_hash function and
AuthenticityHash::compute_keyed now produce standards-compliant MACs.
Add hmac dependency to Cargo.toml.

Expand stdlib with Array.prototype.at and String.prototype.at methods
supporting negative indexing per ES2022 spec. Add
Array.prototype.copyWithin with full clamp-and-direction semantics.
Route ArrayPrototypeCopyWithin, ArrayPrototypeEntries,
ArrayPrototypeKeys, and ArrayPrototypeValues through the heap array
method dispatcher.

Extend benchmark_e2e with new benchmark scenarios and structured output
validation. Add benchmark_e2e_integration.rs test suite (152 lines) and
stdlib_integration.rs test suite (190 lines) for comprehensive coverage
of the new stdlib methods.

Enhance lowering_pipeline with additional IR transformations and
validation passes (+143/-22 lines). Improve promise_model
deterministic scheduling and error propagation. Add static_semantics
scope tracking for new expression forms. Fix causal_replay off-by-one
in event ordering.

Update baseline_interpreter_integration test to use BTreeSet for
granted_capabilities matching a type change in InterpreterConfig.

Update beads issue tracker JSONL with latest state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
